name: Sidebar Navigation
summary: Navigation sidebar with page links, active agent list with status indicators, project/model dropdowns, and agent context menus for operations like rename and delete.
goals: Display navigation links to application pages
Show active agents with real-time status indicators
Provide project and model selection dropdowns
Offer context menu for agent operations

acceptanceCriteria.then: the application navigates to the corresponding page
each agent shows its name and current status with a colored indicator

acceptanceCriteria.given: User right-clicks an agent in the sidebar
acceptanceCriteria.then: options include rename, delete, and other agent operations

unit-test.then: a confirmation dialog appears before deletion

end-to-end.given: Application is running with active agents
end-to-end.then: navigation, agent selection, and context menus all work correctly

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
